lessons.title: Introduction to Deep Cover Pretexting 🎭
lessons.description: Shallow vs. deep pretexts. Why consistency and detail separate amateurs from professionals.

lessons.title: Creating a Believable Persona 🧑‍💼
lessons.description: Crafting a backstory, name, job history, and personality that holds up under scrutiny.

lessons.title: Supporting Artifacts & Digital Footprint 🌐
lessons.description: Building a fake online presence: LinkedIn profiles, email addresses, and domain registration.

lessons.title: Managing the Long Con ⏳
lessons.description: Sustaining a pretext across days or weeks. Handling curveball questions and maintaining consistency.

lessons.title: The Psychology of Deep Cover 🧠
lessons.description: Identity fusion, cognitive load, compartmentalization, and knowing when to burn the pretext.
